text:
There once was a curious hedgehog. Every morning he’d wake up and think: tonight I’ll explore!

One dusk he scampered out. Olfactory wonders! The rosemary felt nice!

That night came moonlit Ow Ow Ow!

He found a moonlight owl owl owl!

Greeted him kindly!

Friendship night owl owl owl!

They soared through owl cities!

Then owl ow Ow Ow Ow Owowl Ow Ow Ow!

They’d wrestle?

Who wore feathers?

They fell asleep wrestling.

Or did?

That owl Ow!

Oooo!

We fly!

That’s all I know.

You fly too!

My flight's lonely.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
